stories.title: Game Recap — Brewers 6, Cubs 2 (June 26)
stories.angle: Misiorowski dominant (6 IP, 1 ER, 8 K). Seiya Suzuki homered for Cubs' only real moment. Cubs fall to 44-38 and need Imanaga to respond tonight. Lead story.
stories.posting_window: 7:00 AM CT (mandatory — game recap always in first available slot)

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Brewers 6, Cubs 2. Jacob Misiorowski was absolutely dominant.

6 innings. 1 run. 8 strikeouts. Seiya Suzuki homered — Chicago's one real punch all night. Cubs fall to 44-38 and need Imanaga to answer tonight.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Game Preview — Imanaga Takes the Ball Tonight
stories.angle: Cubs send their best starter to the mound after last night's loss. 6:10 PM CT at American Family Field. Imanaga vs. the best team in baseball (50-29 Brewers). Bounce-back game.

After Misiorowski shut them down, Chicago turns to its best arm. 6:10 PM CT at American Family Field. Imanaga vs. the best team in baseball.

Time to bounce back.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong — The June for the Ages
stories.angle: PCA's June: 10 HRs, .867 SLG, .410/.474/.867 slash in 20 games. Season: .287/.367/.521, 17 HR, 18 SB. Not a hot streak — a historic month. The 24-year-old is carrying this offense.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Pete Crow-Armstrong in June: 10 HRs. .867 slugging. 20 games.

He's not on a hot streak. He's in the middle of one of the best offensive months in Cubs history. The 24-year-old center fielder is CARRYING this team right now.

#Cubs #GoCubs #ChicagoCubs

stories.title: Jaxon Wiggins — Elbow Inflammation at Iowa
stories.angle: Cubs' top pitching prospect dealing with elbow inflammation after just 2 Iowa starts. Five starters already on the IL. The farm depth the Cubs were counting on is getting thinner.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Jaxon Wiggins — elbow inflammation after just 2 Iowa starts.

The Cubs' top pitching prospect was supposed to add rotation depth down the line. Five starters already on the IL. This depth chart is getting thinner by the week.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Wild Card Watch — Cubs Slip, Cardinals Lurk
stories.angle: After last night's loss, Cubs at 44-38. Cardinals (~42-36 entering yesterday) within a razor-thin margin in win percentage. 37 days until the August 3 trade deadline. The rotation urgency intensifies.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Cubs fall to 44-38. The NL wild card lead is paper-thin — and it might already be gone.

The Cardinals are right there in win percentage with 37 days until the August 3 deadline. Chicago cannot keep losing ground with the rotation this broken.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB
